Product overview

What Are Our Omega-3 Fish Oil Softgels?

Want to enjoy the benefits of a daily omega-3 dose without having to eat fish? Our Omega-3 Fish Oil Softgels offer a handy way to top up on these essential fatty acids. While fish is a favourite on many plates across Ireland, getting the right amount to meet your daily omega-3 needs isn't always easy. That's where our Omega-3 Fish Oil 2000mg Softgels come in!

Just 2 capsules a day give you the goodness of 660mg of EPA and 440mg of DHA. These capsules have no fishy aftertaste and don't give a reflux feeling, making them a seamless addition to your daily routine.

Benefits of Our Omega-3 Fish Oil 2000mg Softgels
  • Here's how the two vital fatty acids, EPA and DHA, in our omega-3 supplements​ support your well-being:
  • EPA & DHA contribute to the normal function of the heart*
  • DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal vision*
  • DHA contributes to the maintenance of normal brain function*
Why Choose Our Omega-3 Fish Oil Softgels?

*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA).

  • While there are multiple omega-3 supplements on the market, here's why our Omega-3 Fish Oil Softgels stand out from the rest -
  • Proudly crafted with over 20 years of industry experience in making wellness supplements and devices
  • Offers 2000mg of fish oil, including 1100mg of omega-3 fatty acids, a stronger potency than many others
  • Responsibly sourced from wild-caught anchovies in deep, cold waters, to give you premium-grade fish oil benefits
  • Third-party lab-tested for pesticides and heavy metals to ensure you enjoy the omega-3 benefits​ without any known side effects
  • Packaged in recyclable PET bottles to lower our carbon footprint and be a more sustainable choice for you
  • Offers the benefits of fish oil without the fishy aftertaste or unpleasant reflux, so you can have your daily dose effortlessly
  • Each bottle contains 240 easy-to-swallow softgels, offering a generous 4-month supply without any reordering hassles
  • GMP-certified supplements to offer you the WeightWorld reliability
  • Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee, so you can try our omega-3 supplements​ risk-free
How to use

Take 2 softgels daily with a full glass of water, preferably with a meal.

Ingredients

Vitamin E (Tocopherol), Gelatin, Glycerol, Purified Water

Nutritional information

Serving Size: 2 Soft Gels Servings per Container : 120

Amount per servingAmount%NRV
Fish Oil1000 mg
Omega-3550 mg
Eicosapentaenoic Acid (EPA)330 mg
Docosahexaenoic Acid220 mg
Advice and storage

Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications or are under medical supervision, please consult a healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Store in a cool and dry place. Keep out of reach of children.
